script: echo '===== Emily bot resource — endpoint URL =====' && az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name emily-claude 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('properties',{}); print('name:', d.get('name')); print('msaAppId:', p.get('msaAppId')); print('endpoint:', p.get('endpoint')); print('displayName:', p.get('displayName'))" 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Aixa bot resource — endpoint URL (for comparison) =====' && az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name aixa 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('properties',{}); print('name:', d.get('name')); print('msaAppId:', p.get('msaAppId')); print('endpoint:', p.get('endpoint'))" 2>&1; echo; echo '===== List ALL bot resources in RG =====' && az resource list --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(b['name'], '->', b.get('properties',{}).get('endpoint','?')) for b in d]"
